lines.speaker: Lieutenant Schepbur
lines.text: Move into position lads! eh? Who are you and what do you want?

lines.speaker: Lieutenant Schepbur
lines.text: Lieutenant Shepbur, commanding officer of the new Armoured Tortoise Regiment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: There's only two tortoises here, that's hardly a regiment.

lines.speaker: Lieutenant Schepbur
lines.text: This is just the beginning! Gnome breeders and trainers are already working to expand the number of units. Soon we'll have hundreds of these beauties, nay thousands! And they will not only carry mages and

lines.speaker: Lieutenant Schepbur
lines.text: archers but other fiendish weapons of destruction of gnome devising. An army of giant tortoises will march upon this battlefield and rain the fire of our wrath upon all our enemies! Nothing will be able to stop us!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oooookayy...... I'll leave you to it then....

lines.speaker: Lieutenant Schepbur
lines.text: Soon Gnome Cuisine will take over the world! Thanks.

lines.speaker: Lieutenant Schepbur
lines.text: You must have had to travel a long way to get this to me. Here's a little something extra as a tip.
